channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Fast-moving fire in Utah, the largest in the US, spreads overnight, leading to more evacuations
item.description: The largest fire in the United States has marched through tinder-dry forest in Utah, fueled by conditions that fire managers and experts call unprecedented.

item.title: Some paid the ultimate price to enact voting rights. Their survivors see America turning backward
Millions drop Obamacare health coverage after subsidies expire and costs rise
